ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "camera_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera */,
  "camera_model" TEXT /* Model of the camera */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the camera */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the camera */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the camera model was released */,
  "sensor_size" REAL /* Size of the camera's sensor */,
  "iso_range" TEXT /* ISO range of the camera */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the image type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the image type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the camera used to capture the image */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the image */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "exposure_time" REAL /* Exposure time of the image */,
  "f_number" REAL /* F-number of the image */,
  "focal_length" REAL /* Focal length of the image */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES image_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the keyword */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the keyword value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "value_name" TEXT /* Name of the value */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the value */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing_history" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being processed */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was processed */,
  "processing_software" TEXT /* Software used for processing */,
  "processing_steps" TEXT /* Steps involved in processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_history_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera setting */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the camera setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_settings_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_settings_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observational_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observational condition */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the observational condition */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the observational condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observational_conditions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata version */,
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metadata */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_details" TEXT /* Details of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_versions_metadata_id FOREIGN KEY ("metadata_id") REFERENCES metadata ("metadata_id")
)
column_names: Year the camera model was released
Unique identifier for each image type
Reference to the camera used to capture the image
Date and time of the user's last login
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the image being accessed
ID of the user accessing the image
Date when the image was accessed
Unique identifier for each processing event
ID of the image being processed
Date when the image was processed

Unique identifier for each metadata version
